metadata.title: States PCS: Andhra Pradesh GK For APPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which of the following is the correct meaning for the term Heranika in context with administration of Satavahanas?
questions.explanation: In Satavahana administration Heranika means Treasurer Ganapaka- Accountant Nibandhankara- Registrar of Documents Patlika Palaka- Director of Archives

questions.question: Who authored the Telugu work ‘Dasa-kumara-charitamu’?
questions.explanation: Kethana translated Dandin’s ‘Dasha-kumara-charita’ into Telugu as ‘Dasa-kumara-charitamu’ and called himself Abhinava Dandi.

questions.question: Qutub Shahi ruler Ibrahim occupied the throne with the help of:
questions.explanation: Ibrahim occupied the throne with the help of Ramaraya, but soon they became inveterate enemies.

questions.question: In which year Telangana Regional committee was abolished?
questions.explanation: After acceptance of Six-point formula , Telangana Regional committee which was constituted in 1958 was abolished in the year 1974.

questions.question: What is the location of the new capital city of Andhra Pradesh, Amaravati regarding river banks, and which ancient dynasty was it the capital of?

options.label: A
options.text: The southern banks of the Pennar river, Chalukya dynasty

options.label: B
options.text: The southern banks of the Krishna river, Satavahana dynasty

options.label: C
options.text: The northern banks of the Krishna river, Ikshvakus dynasty

options.label: D
options.text: The southern banks of the Nagavali river, Ganga dynasty

answer.label: B
answer.text: The southern banks of the Krishna river, Satavahana dynasty

questions.explanation: Amaravati, the new capital of Andhra Pradesh, is located on the southern banks of the Krishna River and was a significant city during the Satavahana dynasty

questions.question: Who authored the book ‘Why Socialism’?
questions.explanation: The book ‘Why Socialism’ was authored by Jayaprakash Narayan, a prominent Indian independence activist, theorist and political leader.

questions.question: What is the length of the coastline of Andhra Pradesh?
questions.explanation: The state has a coastline of about 972 km, making it one of the longest coastlines in India, which plays a crucial role in trade and tourism.

questions.question: Who was the pioneering Indian athlete who became the first to score a century in the Ranji Trophy in 1934?
questions.explanation: Syed Mohammad Hadi was a versatile athlete and the first to score a Ranji Trophy century in 1934.

questions.question: Who was the renowned Carnatic vocalist who adopted and trained Malaysian-born Chinese vocalist Chong Chiu Sen?
questions.explanation: Chong Chiu Sen was adopted and trained by D.K. Pattammal, a legendary Carnatic vocalist.

questions.question: Which major temple in Andhra Pradesh was historically supervised by the Satani community until the 16th century?
questions.explanation: The Satani community historically supervised Tirupati temple until the 16th century; they are linked to Tenkalai Vaishnavism and Alvars.
